code: import axios from'axios';axios.defaults.baseURL='http://localhost:4040';export async function fetchAuthors(){const{data}=await axios.get(`/authors?_embed=books`);return data;}export async function fetchBooks(){const{data}=await axios.get(`/books`);return data;}export async function fetchBookById(bookId){const{data}=await axios.get(`/books/${bookId}?_expand=author`);return data;}
